base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mist_village — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. Mist — Rydia's home village. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mist — Rydia's home village; destroyed in opening-act
